description: {"edges": "Slightly irregular, some necrosis present.", "veins": "Visible, but not prominently affected; some discoloration along veins."} {"color": "Brown to dark brown, with some yellowing (chlorosis) around the lesions.", "shape": "Irregular, small to medium-sized spots; some coalescing to form larger patches."} Symptoms are widespread across the leaf surface, with a higher concentration towards the margins and interveinal areas.
